issues.detail: The skill does not address error scenarios or edge cases for applying mental models.
The skill file contains extensive explanatory text that could be trimmed for brevity.

scenarios.name: Diagnose missed sprint commitments
scenarios.rationale: Treatment applied 5-Fold Why drilling past symptoms to a root cause (dependency mapping in sprint planning) and explicitly invoked Brooks's Law to reject adding more developers; baseline gave generic agile fixes without root-cause structure.

scenarios.name: Solo founder busy but unproductive
scenarios.rationale: Treatment prescribed MITs set the prior evening, protected morning monoidealism blocks, batched async communication windows, and a shutdown brain-dump — all skill-specific; baseline offered standard time-blocking and Pomodoro advice.
